# init

**Instance Method**

Initializes the packet submission queue.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual bool init();
```

## Return Value

`YES` if initialization was successful, or `NO` if it wasn’t.

## Discussion

Don’t call this method directly. Instead, use the [doc://com.apple.networkingdriverkit/documentation/NetworkingDriverKit/IOUserNetworkRxSubmissionQueue/Create] method of the appropriate subclass.

## Configuring the Packet Queue

- **free**: Performs any final cleanup for the queue.
